news.title: BNP eyes December council, begins preparations for local polls
news.snippet: BNP reviewed its organisational roadmap, governance priorities and election strategy, with leaders stressing the need to strengthen the party's grassroots base ahead of local government elections.

news.title: Bangladesh retains 2nd spot in US apparel market as China slump reshapes sourcing
news.snippet: US buyers continued shifting away from China, but Bangladesh has yet to capture a significant share of the redirected apparel orders despite remaining the second-largest supplier.

news.title: Flood death toll reaches 44 as over 10 lakh people affected in 7 districts
news.snippet: Authorities warn fresh flooding could hit northern regions as rivers continue to swell.

news.title: Video of body on raft going through floodwaters goes viral; Satkania UNO says misrepresented for 'views'
news.snippet: Local administration says the body was brought home on a fishing raft before being buried through normal procedures.

news.title: Heavy rain, rough sea disrupt Ctg Port services, supply chain
news.snippet: Five days of heavy rain and rough seas have slowed cargo handling at Chattogram Port, stranded dozens of vessels and disrupted inland transportation.

news.title: SME owners demand policy reforms to ease business

news.title: PM chairs BNP Standing Committee meeting on flood situation
news.snippet: The party’s top policymaking body is discussing the flood situation, organisational issues and other political matters, according to BNP sources.

news.title: Most landslide shelters in Ctg, Bandarban need major upgrades: Study
news.snippet: Only 5.4% of assessed shelters reamin suitable for emergencies

news.title: Labour rules must align with amended law, experts urge government

news.title: 5 killed as bus rams into roadside crowd in Faridpur; locals block highway

news.title: DSE finds AFC Agro’s factory closed, adding to growing list of non-operational firms

news.title: IMF mission due tomorrow to assess Bangladesh's readiness for fresh loan deal

news.title: Fulfil promises or face pressure to implement referendum verdict: Jamaat chief
news.snippet: The youth fought against inequality and corruption and the referendum was held as part of the reform process, Shafiqur Rahman says.

news.title: Train services on Chattogram-Cox's Bazar route likely to resume tomorrow

news.title: Govt to raise firearm licence fees under revised policy

news.snippet: Nahid criticised the BNP-backed mayor of Chattogram, alleging that he had failed to take effective measures to address the city's chronic waterlogging.

news.title: ILO Convention on Decent Work in the Platform Economy, 2026: A changemaking blueprint for Bangladesh
news.snippet: The provisions, which apply to all digital labour platforms and all digital platform workers regardless of employment classification, provide a comprehensive framework for regulating work organised or facilitated through digital technologies

news.title: Humans versus human resources

news.title: How conflicting policy signals are keeping private investment on hold
news.snippet: Economists argue that lower taxes alone are not enough to drive private investment when financing and business conditions remain challenging.

news.title: Fiscal policy says spend, monetary policy says stop: Can investment gain pace amid this policy standoff?
news.snippet: The million-dollar question is whether businesses will invest when lending rates sit at 12-14%. Businesses say they need 15-18% operating profit just to service debt but profits remain thin or nonexistent. Without that margin, investment stalls.

news.title: Vegetable exports fail to grow due to weak diversification of basket and market
news.snippet: Export Promotion Bureau data show that vegetable exports earned $88.88 million in FY26, up 9.57% from $81.12 million a year earlier. But this is $14.36 million below the $103.24 million earned in FY15

news.title: EU tells Instagram, Facebook to change addictive features or risk fines
news.snippet: The European Commission's preliminary findings follow a two-year investigation under the European Union's landmark Digital Services Act, which requires large online platforms to do more to tackle illegal and harmful content.

news.title: Funding the unfundable: What Bangladesh's banks still cannot see

news.title: Is gold a good investment?

news.title: Delisting is not the solution: Inquiry, accountability and investor protection must come first

news.title: SK Hynix set for marquee US debut in test for AI appetite
news.snippet: The South Korean chipmaker is the latest to ride a frenzy of investor interest in ​firms perceived as reaping big gains from the AI revolution that has spawned hundreds of billions of dollars in capital spending.

news.title: Islami Bank remains remittance leader in FY26 as Krishi, BRAC banks post strong gains

news.title: How football carried war, empire and power over the last century

news.title: BSEC chief unveils reform agenda to strengthen capital market

news.title: OECD warns of shrinking dev finance as Bangladesh urges stronger multilateral support

news.title: ADB cuts Bangladesh FY27 growth forecast to 4.5% over energy, banking sector concerns
news.snippet: In its Asian Development Outlook (ADO) July 2026, released yesterday (8 July), the Manila-based lender revised down its FY27 growth projection from 4.7% forecast in April, citing ongoing energy constraints and weaknesses in the financial sector.
